name: AgentScope Sandbox
description: Remote sandbox backend powered by AgentScope protocol via sandbox-manager HTTP API.

managerToken.label: Manager Token
managerToken.help: Bearer token for authenticating with sandbox-manager.

sandboxType.label: Sandbox Type
sandboxType.help: ToolServer name registered in agent-runtime-controller (e.g. agentscope-sandbox).

workdir.label: Remote Workdir
workdir.help: Working directory inside the sandbox. Defaults to /workspace.

agentWorkdir.label: Remote Agent Workdir
agentWorkdir.help: Agent workspace directory inside the sandbox.

timeoutSeconds.label: Timeout (seconds)
timeoutSeconds.help: Sandbox idle timeout in seconds. Defaults to 300.
